scripts.build: tailwindcss -i ./src/styles.css -o ./dist/styles.css --minify && cp *.html dist/ && cp *.js dist/ && cp service-worker.js dist/
scripts.deploy: npm run build && echo 'Build complete. Upload the dist/ folder to your web server.'
scripts.test: npm run build && echo 'Build test passed. Check dist/ folder for output.'
